ns2:xmlError.ns2:desc: cvc-enumeration-valid: Value 'None/No Delay' is not facet-valid with respect to enumeration '[2208001, 2208003, 2208005, 2208007, 2208009, 2208011, 2208013, 2208015, 2208017, 2208019, 2208021, 2208023]'. It must be a value from the enumeration.
cvc-complex-type.2.2: Element 'eResponse.08' must have no element [children], and the value must be valid.

cvc-enumeration-valid: Value 'None/No Delay' is not facet-valid with respect to enumeration '[2209001, 2209003, 2209005, 2209007, 2209009, 2209011, 2209013, 2209015, 2209017, 2209019, 2209021, 2209023, 2209025, 2209027, 2209029, 2209031, 2209033, 2209035]'. It must be a value from the enumeration.

cvc-enumeration-valid: Value 'Clean-up' is not facet-valid with respect to enumeration '[2212001, 2212003, 2212005, 2212007, 2212009, 2212011, 2212013, 2212015, 2212017, 2212019, 2212021, 2212023, 2212025, 2212027, 2212029, 2212031, 2212033]'. It must be a value from the enumeration.
cvc-complex-type.2.2: Element 'eResponse.12' must have no element [children], and the value must be valid.

cvc-enumeration-valid: Value 'Equipment/Supply Replenishment' is not facet-valid with respect to enumeration '[2212001, 2212003, 2212005, 2212007, 2212009, 2212011, 2212013, 2212015, 2212017, 2212019, 2212021, 2212023, 2212025, 2212027, 2212029, 2212031, 2212033]'. It must be a value from the enumeration.
cvc-complex-type.2.2: Element 'eResponse.12' must have no element [children], and the value must be valid.

cvc-enumeration-valid: Value 'Intersection Navigation-With Automated Light Changing Technology' is not facet-valid with respect to enumeration '[2224001, 2224003, 2224005, 2224007, 2224009, 2224011, 2224013, 2224015, 2224017, 2224019, 2224021, 2224023]'. It must be a value from the enumeration.
cvc-complex-type.2.2: Element 'eResponse.24' must have no element [children], and the value must be valid.
cvc-enumeration-valid: Value 'Yes, With Pre-Arrival Instructions' is not facet-valid with respect to enumeration '[2302001, 2302003, 2302005, 2302007]'. It must be a value from the enumeration.
cvc-complex-type.2.2: Element 'eDispatch.02' must have no element [children], and the value must be valid.
cvc-enumeration-valid: Value 'Critical' is not facet-valid with respect to enumeration '[2305001, 2305003, 2305005, 2305007]'. It must be a value from the enumeration.
cvc-type.3.1.3: The value 'Critical' of element 'eDispatch.05' is not valid.
cvc-datatype-valid.1.2.1: 'Eglin Air Force Base' is not a valid value for 'integer'.
cvc-complex-type.2.2: Element 'ePatient.06' must have no element [children], and the value must be valid.
cvc-pattern-valid: Value 'Okaloosa County' is not facet-valid with respect to pattern '[0-9]{5}' for type 'ANSICountyCode'.
cvc-complex-type.2.2: Element 'ePatient.07' must have no element [children], and the value must be valid.
cvc-pattern-valid: Value '' is not facet-valid with respect to pattern '[0-9]{9}' for type 'SocialSecurityNumber'.
cvc-complex-type.2.2: Element 'ePatient.12' must have no element [children], and the value must be valid.

cvc-enumeration-valid: Value 'Middle Eastern or North African' is not facet-valid with respect to enumeration '[2514001, 2514003, 2514005, 2514007, 2514009, 2514011, 2514013]'. It must be a value from the enumeration.
cvc-complex-type.2.2: Element 'ePatient.14' must have no element [children], and the value must be valid.

cvc-enumeration-valid: Value 'Primary' is not facet-valid with respect to enumeration '[2611001, 2611003, 2611005, 2611007, 2611009, 2611011, 2611013, 2611015, 2611017, 2611019, 2611021, 2611023, 2611025]'. It must be a value from the enumeration.

cvc-pattern-valid: Value 'Virginia' is not facet-valid with respect to pattern '[0-9]{2}' for type 'ANSIStateCode'.
cvc-type.3.1.3: The value 'Virginia' of element 'ePayment.14' is not valid.

cvc-enumeration-valid: Value 'Self' is not facet-valid with respect to enumeration '[2622001, 2622003, 2622005, 2622009, 2622011, 2622013, 2622015, 2622017, 2622019]'. It must be a value from the enumeration.
